mods.name: Scan Indicator
mods.author: corym
mods.description: Displays scan-progress diamonds on battle portrait cards showing wiki knowledge level for each animon.

mods.name: HoloboardHoloken
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Allows throwing the holoken while riding the holoboard.

mods.name: DualTypeHoloken
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Allows using an animon's hidden secondary type to activate matching elemental objects in the overworld.

mods.name: EvoScan
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Automatically applies research level 3 to animon post-evolution without requiring them to be scanned in a battle.

mods.name: WeatherWheel
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Allows player to manually change weather using radial menu.
